introduction.name: Liam
introduction.text: hello! welcome to Torsion's Spinning Tower of Terror. how may i help you?

talk_1.name: Axel
talk_1.text: I'm here because your boss cursed me to spin forever and now I WANT HIS HEAD ON A PIKE.

talk_2.name: Liam
talk_2.text: oh so THAT's why you're like that... sorry man he's just kinda crazy lol.

question_1.name: Liam
question_1.text: So. Uh. did you make an appointment?

choice_1_1_2.name: Liam
choice_1_1_2.text: okay so he's kinda busy rn so you're kind of out of luck. unless you wanted to fight your way up to floor 11 through his hoard of minions i guess.

choice_1_1_3.name: Axel
choice_1_1_3.text: well I GUESS THAT'S WHAT I'LL DO!

choice_1_2_2.name: Liam
choice_1_2_2.text: okay then! all guests must fight there way up to floor 11 through his hoard of minions if they want the right to speak with him.

choice_1_2_3.name: Axel
choice_1_2_3.text: well it was worth a shot i guess.

question_2.name: Liam
question_2.text: cool! so do you need any help with that?

choice_2_1_2.name: Liam
choice_2_1_2.text: Of course! Why not? He pays me less than minimum wage.

choice_2_1_3.name: Liam
choice_2_1_3.text: You shoot using LMB and reload with R. Slow your spin at any time by holding the spacebar, but if you spin fast enough before doing it you'll fire a special attack! Oh, and you can dash with shift.

choice_2_2_1.name: Axel
choice_2_2_1.text: NO! I would never take advice from my enemy

choice_2_2_2.name: Liam
choice_2_2_2.text: Okay so you shoot with LMB and you reload with...
